scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/vue/tsconfig.build.json && vite build --config packages/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/vue/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
